headline: Supermicro Advances Enterprises' Adoption of Accelerated Computing Across AI Factory, Data Center, and Edge with Expanded Portfolio Featuring NVIDIA RTX PRO Blackwell Server Edition GPUs
summary: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI), a Total IT Solution Provider for Cloud Computing, AI/ML, Storage, and 5G/Edge is announcing new additions to its broad portfolio of enterprise solutions to meet the growing demands of today's AI-enabled and graphical computing applications, in a wider range of enterprise environments.
